overall.description: Cinematic game footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a stormy night at a remote mountain campsite. The player character moves around a crackling campfire near a wooden watchtower before venturing into the rain-soaked wilderness with dramatic mountain vistas and turbulent skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain campsite with fire and wooden watchtower

events.description: camera circles around the campfire revealing the wooden tower from different angles

agents.ego_description: walking around the campsite, observing the crackling fire and nearby structures in the heavy rain

entered.detail: burning campfire with flames flickering and smoke rising in the rain
tall wooden log tower with warm light glowing from upper windows
stacked wooden barrels and tubs near the fire
wooden crates and supplies arranged under a small shelter
large rock formation and boulders behind the campsite

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a rainy mountain campsite centered around a crackling campfire. A tall wooden watchtower stands to the left with warm light glowing from its window, while supplies and barrels are scattered nearby. The camera moves around the fire, revealing the rocky cliff face behind the camp as rain falls steadily.

scene_state.functional_zone: stormy mountain wilderness with rocky terrain

events.description: leaving the campsite behind and entering the open mountain wilderness
moonlight breaks through storm clouds illuminating the distant valley and peaks

agents.ego_description: traversing the mountainous terrain away from camp, moving through grassy slopes and rocky outcrops in the storm

entered.detail: distant mountain peaks silhouetted against the dramatic storm clouds
scattered evergreen pine trees dotting the hillside
large boulders and rocky terrain formations
dark turbulent storm clouds covering the sky with occasional lightning

segments.scene_description: Leaving the campsite behind, the view opens into a vast mountain wilderness under a turbulent stormy sky. The camera traverses grassy slopes dotted with pine trees and rocky outcrops, moving deeper into the dark landscape. Occasional breaks in the clouds allow moonlight to illuminate the distant mountain peaks before the storm closes in again.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the intimate warmth of a rainy mountain campsite into the vast, turbulent expanse of a stormy wilderness. It begins by circling a crackling campfire, passing by scattered supplies and a tall wooden watchtower glowing with warm light against a rocky cliff face. As the camera leaves the shelter of the camp, the view opens wide to reveal grassy slopes and pine trees under a dark, oppressive sky. The scene then pushes deeper into the rugged landscape, where occasional breaks in the clouds allow moonlight to illuminate distant mountain peaks before the storm closes in once more.
